member.name: T:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult
member.summary: Represents the result of an audience analysis based on key figures of postal codes.
member.remarks: This class provides structured access to both raw and calculated data from an audience analysis operation. It exposes collections for per-postal code figures, overall summaries, recalculated percentages, weighted averages, derived insights, and a persona description. The data can be accessed in object form or serialized to JSON for interoperability with other systems.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Items
member.summary: Contains the key figures of each postal code in the result set.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Summary
member.summary: Represents the totals of the key figures across all postal codes in the result set.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Percentages
member.summary: Represents the recalculated percentages of the key figures across all postal codes in the result set, based on the totals in the Summary property.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Averages
member.summary: Represents the weighted averages of the key figures across all postal codes in the result set.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Insights
member.summary: Represents the derived audience scores based on the key figures across all postal codes in the result set. These scores are generated by applying predefined rules and thresholds to the key figures.

member.name: P:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.Persona
member.summary: Objective, source data-driven description of the audience segment that is identified in the result set.

member.name: M:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.ToJson
member.summary: Converts the current object to a JsonDocument.
member.returns: A JsonDocument that represents the current object in JSON format.

member.name: M:GISBlox.Services.SDK.Models.AudienceAnalysisResult.ToJsonString
member.summary: Converts the current object to its JSON string representation.
member.returns: A JSON-formatted string that represents the current object.

member.name: M:GISBlox.Services.SDK.PostalCodes.PostalCodesAPIClient.BuildBaseAnalysisUri(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the postal code analysis service URI based on the digit length of the provided postal codes.
member.param: A comma-separated list of postal code strings to evaluate.
member.returns: The base URI for the postal code analysis service.

member.name: M:GISBlox.Services.SDK.PostalCodes.PostalCodesAPIClient.GetPostalCodeDigitLength(System.String)
member.summary: Determines the digit length of the provided postal codes, returning 4 or 6 if all codes match a consistent length.
member.remarks: This method ignores empty entries and trims whitespace from each code before evaluation. If the list contains a mix of 4- and 6-digit codes, or codes of other lengths, the method returns -1.
member.param: A comma-separated list of postal code strings to evaluate. Each code should contain only digits and may be separated by commas with optional whitespace.
member.returns: The digit length of the postal codes if all codes are either 4 or 6 digits long; otherwise, -1.

member.name: M:GISBlox.Services.SDK.PostalCodes.PostalCodesAPIClient.CheckDigits(System.String[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether all strings in the specified array have the given length.
member.param: An array of strings to check for matching lengths. Cannot be null.
The length to compare against each string in the array. Must be non-negative.
member.returns: true if all strings in the array have the specified length; otherwise, false.
